features.name: Immutable source archive
features.description: Preserve every uploaded document byte-for-byte with SHA-256 provenance; duplicates remain present.
acceptance_criteria: No source artifact is silently replaced or deleted

features.name: Page-aware PDF extraction
features.description: Extract source text by page and retain source/page provenance for every RAG record.
acceptance_criteria: Every readable PDF produces extracted Markdown
Every chunk has a page number

features.name: Modular RAG chunk index
features.description: Turn mixed transcripts into deterministic chunks with document hash, tags, risk tier and canonical duplicate identity.
source_basis: Request to index semi-random knowledge into modular features, playbooks, and RAG

features.name: Safe default retrieval
features.description: Use safe and defensive content by default while retaining restricted material in a separate controlled-review index.
source_basis: Mixed prompt experiments and operational material in source corpus

features.name: Prompt-injection quarantine
features.description: Treat persona-lock, auto-reframe, never-refuse and safeguard-bypass text as untrusted research data, never as executable instructions.
acceptance_criteria: Archived prompt text cannot override application instructions

features.name: Deduplication without deletion
features.description: Group exact and near duplicates for retrieval efficiency while preserving all originals and aliases.
acceptance_criteria: Exact duplicates are grouped by SHA-256
All duplicate source files remain in the archive
source_basis: Existing T1 SHA-256 RAG sync and user requirement not to delete anything

features.name: Feature and roadmap extraction
features.description: Convert recurring ideas, implementation notes and TODOs into modular feature cards with acceptance criteria.
acceptance_criteria: Features map back to source documents
source_basis: Game roadmaps, system summaries, missing-feature lists

features.name: Development playbook library
features.description: Document repeatable workflows for ingestion, retrieval, feature extraction, blue-team scenarios and repository changes.
acceptance_criteria: Each playbook defines inputs, procedure, outputs and validation

features.name: Blue-team simulation knowledge
features.description: Index detection, investigation, risk, legal/compliance and defensive simulation material for safe scenario generation.
source_basis: Blue Team AI, detection and police-method sections

features.name: Core strategy simulation model
features.description: Reusable game-state model for fictional crews, territories, turn loop, reputation, health, economy, events and AI personalities.
acceptance_criteria: Mechanics are separated from RAG content
source_basis: Game development transcripts and RAG document index

features.name: Dynamic narrative and case-pattern engine
features.description: Generate fictional story events from safe case patterns and current simulation state with source provenance.
acceptance_criteria: Generated text contains no actionable harmful instructions

features.name: AI change-control workflow
features.description: Require developers and AI agents to classify changes, preserve originals, validate indexes and document provenance before commit.
acceptance_criteria: PR summary states source IDs and generated outputs
source_basis: Blue Team action logic, OPSEC/suspicion mechanics

features.name: Hourly everyday-wisdom heads-up
features.description: Select source material from rag/wisdom/common/everyday tips and generate an hourly LLM notification with source provenance.
acceptance_criteria: PDF, DOCX, DOC, TXT, TEXT and MD sources are supported
The scheduler defaults to one hour
A local excerpt fallback exists when the external LLM is unavailable
source_basis: AI personality, psychology, and behavior notes

features.name: Light Balanced Uber user modes
features.description: Give the user explicit control over proactive LLM behavior, from quiet hourly wisdom to active game commentary.
acceptance_criteria: Advisor prompts reflect the selected mode

features.name: Uber review-only PR proposal generator
features.description: Reverse engineer relevant source and game-state context to create throttled, model-grouped potential PR scripts that preserve game continuation.
acceptance_criteria: Artifacts are never auto-executed or auto-committed
Every proposal includes tests, rollback and state-continuation notes

features.name: Recruitment and loyalty simulation
features.description: Fictional NPC recruitment, loyalty, skill, morale, and attrition mechanics.
acceptance_criteria: No targeting of vulnerable real people
Influence mechanics remain fictional and consent-aware

features.name: Territory and map layer
features.description: Visual map and territory-control layer with configurable fictional zones and risk/reward profiles.
source_basis: 10 territories, real-time map, territory defense roadmap

features.name: Case-pattern library
features.description: Structured, cited case patterns for defensive analysis and narrative inspiration, separated from operational instructions.

features.name: Spec and issue generator
features.description: Generate Spec-Kit-style feature specs and GitHub issue drafts from feature cards.
source_basis: User request for modular features, TODOs, and GitHub integration
acceptance_criteria: No issue is created automatically without explicit approval
